text:
Market today:
The chip sector is feeling pain from SK Hynix volatility, directly impacting your core holdings. Geopolitical tensions are also rising with Trump's proposed Strait of Hormuz toll, adding to general market uncertainty.

Your holdings:
SOXL is a major concern, down over 35% and flagged "SELL." SPAL, another leveraged ETF, is also down 34% since you opened it. Both are highly volatile and their drops are amplified on margin. QQQI is flagged "TRIM" with a minor loss.

Watch:
Keep a close eye on further developments in the semiconductor sector and any escalation in geopolitical tensions. These could directly affect your concentrated tech/chip book.

Bottom line:
Prioritize managing risk on your leveraged positions and stay alert to chip sector headwinds.
plays: SOXL is flagged "SELL" and down 35%. With increasing chip sector headwinds, consider reducing exposure to this leveraged ETF.
SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is down 34%. Given its volatility and decay, consider trimming this position to manage risk.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
